description: Standing cofounder-eye LLM-judgment leaf (PROTOTYPE): briefs itself to founder level from the vision-and-strategy + MVP docs, then judges from first principles whether the system as it actually exists plausibly accomplishes Commonality's real-world goal — are the core use cases implemented end-to-end (not just unit-green), and does the whole add up to a compelling MVP? MILESTONE-AWARE: each finding declares the lowest milestone rung by which it must be resolved, so a 'not MVP-complete yet' gap is advisory now but turns this check red once we claim that rung. Returns uncertain for gaps that only bite at a higher rung; fails only on gaps that block the current rung.
